content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_COMMISSION]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_COMMISSION]
( 
	[CommissionID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[JobID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CommissionPaymentTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SalesRepID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PaymentAmount] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[BatchFlag] [bit]  NULL,
	[BatchNumber] [int]  NULL,
	[BatchDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[CoCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[FileNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Comments] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[EnteredOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[EnteredBy] [int]  NULL,
	[UpdatedOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[UpdatedBy] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CommissionID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_JobID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CommissionPaymentTypeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_SalesRepID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [CommissionID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
